title: TerminationTypeValues
description: Specifies the timing or method for terminating the agreement - for repos.(ISO20022)

x-enumeration-literals.name: Overnight
x-enumeration-literals.description: Repo with a term of one day.(ISO20022)

x-enumeration-literals.name: Term
x-enumeration-literals.description: Repo with a term of more than one day.(ISO20022)

x-enumeration-literals.name: Flexible
x-enumeration-literals.description: Identifies "a classic term repo with the added feature that the cash is repaid to the buyer in installments" (Definition from "Mastering Repo Markets" by Bob Steiner).(ISO20022)

x-enumeration-literals.name: Open
x-enumeration-literals.description: Repo which can be terminated by either party at any time, and which has an unspecified repurchase date.(ISO20022)
